Game.Name: Sougou Kakutougi - Astral Bout (Japan)
Game.plot: Overview:Sougou Kakutougi: Astral Bout, or simply Astral Bout, is the first in a series of competitive fighting games that focus on the then-fledgling Fighting Network Rings promotion that pits fighters of various disciplines against each other in an early form of televised mixed martial arts, or MMA.Players can select between nine fighters that each use a distinctive fighting style: Sambo (a Russian martial art similar to Judo), Muay Thai kickboxing, Professional Wrestling (including Lucha Libre), Karate, Judo, Boxing, Kung Fu and a general form of martial arts.Characters:James Taylor, a boxer who bears a distinct resemblance to Mike Tyson.
Game.Notes: Enter the deadliest arena in the world, as Fighting Network Rings brings you MMA with Astral Bout. With 8 different fighting styles, special submission attacks, and stiff kicks from pro wrestling legend Akira Maeda, you better be sure you got what it takes to survive this MEGA BATTLE!
